title: ice40_wrapcarry does not appear to respect (* keep *) attribute on SB_CARRY cells

features.name: keep attribute on cell instantiation
features.description: Code should include a cell instantiation with (* keep *) attribute applied to prevent optimization

features.name: wrapper cell attribute loss through transformation
features.description: Code should include a cell with (* keep *) attribute being wrapped by a wrapper cell, where the wrapper must inherit the keep attribute but does not

features.name: ice40 SB_CARRY cell with keep
features.description: Code should include an ice40 SB_CARRY cell marked with (* keep *) attribute to preserve it through synthesis
